programme.desc: I över fyra år har Gierra dejtat Shay som är klubbpromotor. Gierra vill bilda familj med sin partner, men misstänker att Shays kontakter med andra kvinnor har gett henne foten.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Gänget träffar medlemmar i stammen Stoney Nakoda Yandy är rädd att problemen i hennes äktenskap är för svåra. Joc bjuder med Gloria och hoppas att Kendra inte blir för arg.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: En femkant skakar om gruppdynamiken. Justins självdestruktivitet hotar hans relation med Max. Danny skapar kontakt.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: En gemensam strategi går snett och en oväntad frontfigur hotas av eliminering.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness får Rob och Sterling sällskap av Camille Kostek för att se lövblåsar i 'Blås på' innan de försöker sig på sina bästa skotska accenter i 'Skojiga skottar' och så avslutar de allt med 'Hyrcykelspillror'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness tar Rob, Steelo och gästen Karrueche Tran timeout på grund av 'Ledsna lagkamrater', tar bort fläckarna på sina 'Mattkatastrofer' och luktar på rosorna medan de ramlar i 'Blommor som faller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta nya 'Ridiculousness' visar Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal den lekfulla sidan av polisarbete i 'Kul med konstapeln', blir pendlargalna i 'Leker i trafiken' och provar snabba snacks i 'Gurkor i farten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness pratar Rob, Steelo och Karrueche Tran om sina hangups i 'Tappade samtal', jobbar på att försöka att inte skratta för mycket i 'Älskar mitt jobb' och blir upplivade i 'Tecknat på riktigt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av 'Ridiculousness' välkomnar Rob och Steelo Karrueche Tran för att kolla in några 'Demoleringsrumpor', köra 'Träning överallt' och göra en liten 'Snaskdans'.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Artis träffade den blonda skönheten Jess online för 5 år sedan. De var båda i förhållanden men trodde att de hade funnit den sanna kärleken med varandra. Artis är äntligen redo att träffa Jess personligen. Men är Jess allt hon säger sig vara?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev och Max får två kattfiskar för priset av en när de upptäcker att samma kille lurar både Dejay och Malik. Det går hett till när de upptäcker hur explosiv en kärlekstriangel faktiskt kan vara.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Modedesignern Truth vill ha sin nätkärlek Ray'Quan trots att han har ett förhållande. Dramatiken tätnar när Nev och Zeke Thomas får reda på vem som döljer sig bakom profilen. Truth kan inte hantera sanningen.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Lucille ledde ett enkelt liv ända tills hon blev tillfrågad om hon ville jobba för en lovande musikproducent vid namn Kidd Cole. Företag fick aldrig betalt för sina tjänster och en vacker dag hade Kidd gått upp i rök. Får Lucille svaren hon behöver?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Efter ett treårigt nätförhållande har Tiana flyttat tvärsöver hela landet för att vara med sitt livs kärlek, James, och för att avslöja sin egen hemlighet. Men nu när de bor i samma stat är James svårare att få tag på än nånsin.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Amy spår gruppen och får Karlie att ta ställning mot Spicegänget. De åker ut i backen, och faller till marken. Spice har en plan för att få ett fint slut på resan. Yandy inser att äktenskapet kan vara bortom räddning.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Ciara är fullkomligt hängiven sin pojkvän Kwame Men en skiftning i Kwames attityd får henne att tvivla på hans engagemang.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Iögonfallande tv-personligheten Redd har bröllop planerat men misstänker att hennes fästman äventyrar deras nio år långa förhållande med en annan kvinna, som råkar vara en gemensam vän.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK
programme.desc: Mia blir förkrossad när hon upptäcker att grälet med Manley påverkar Marliya djupt; Chloe och Jordan säger adjö till sitt allra första hem; Amber börjar ta tillbaka kontrollen över sitt liv.

programme.title: The Challenge: All Stars
programme.desc: 22 legendarer återförenas efter flera år borta från spelet, i jakten på förstapriset på 500 000 dollar. Det blir allvar med en intensiv första utmaning. En ärlig spelare har svårt med spelets smutsiga taktik.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt 'Ridiculousness' ska Rob, Chanel och Steelo upptäcka att shopping kan vara kul i 'Stök i mataffären', träffa händiga 'Vänner som kan göra mycket' och laga mat med 'Middagspappor'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt 'Ridiculousness' ska Rob, Chanel och Steelo få fart på påkarna i 'Glada fötter', köra fram i 'Drive-thru-lycka' och komma ifrån omvärlden i 'Min egen grej'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness är Rob, Chanel och Steelo rasande över att 'Det byggs hos grannen', upptäcker en del nya repor i 'P-platsproblem' och ger sig ut på vägarna för 'Nöjesturer'.

programme.title: Behind the Music
programme.desc: Fat Joe berättar om sin resa från gatorna i Bronx till att bli en hiphopikon och banbrytare för latinamerikaner i genren. Joes återhämtningsförmåga och ihärdighet lyser igenom när han söker klarhet i svåra stunder.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Med bara sex artister kvar är det viktigaste att nu kontrollera spelet. Kampen om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master är intensivare än någonsin tidigare.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Det finns ingenstans att gömma sig när deltagarna testas i precisionsporträtt. En av av de missar målet och skickas hem. Kampen fortsätter om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink master.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta nya 'Ridiculousness' får Rob och Sterling sällskap av Camille Kostek för att dela pinsamma ögonblick när de träffar 'Fläckfritt glas', diskutera hemmafaror i 'Smärtborgen' och att förlora saker i havsdjupet i 'Vattensjuk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness är Rob, Steelo och Nina Agdal åskådare till 'Skoterparkskrascher', går på krogen för att göra 'Saker att bli utkastad för' och konfronterar djur som i princip är 'Typ monster'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I detta nya 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo och gästen Brie Bella hålla stånd mot 'Elaka gäss', hoppa av 'Hoppbilar' och försöka ge 'Stjärtskåresnubbarna' ett bälte.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness hälsar Rob och Steelo Brittney Elena välkommen när de tappar sina snacks i 'Matfamlare', upptäcker att telefoner kan vara farliga i 'Telefonbomber' och visar efter några drinkar att de har 'Berusad begåvning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness får Rob och Steelo besök av Brittney Elena! De inleder med 'Isbrytare' innan de går vidare till australiska vilda djur i 'Fara där nere', för att sen reda ut 'Kommunikationsmissar'.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Ett nytt kändisex blir ett hot för ett redan skört par. Tamara går vidare efter Joe, och Paige slits mellan gammalt och nytt.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Franco-Danish painter, Camille Pissarro. You will discover his labour with View from Louveciennes, A path through the fields, Pontoise or Peasant girl making a fire.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », écrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Théo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est basé ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musée Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visité le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en créant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la découverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: This gallery was built in the 16th century as the seat for Florence’s new administrative offices (uffizi), and opened to the public as the Uffizi Gallery in the 18th century. Today it still offers the world’s most beautiful collection of Italian Renaissance art. How could anyone remain insensitive to the sensual beauty of “The Birth of Venus” by Botticelli, “The Venus of Urbino” by Titian, or Correggio’s “Danae”? Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: A tall tower in the heart of Copenhagen, the RADISSON SAS ROYAL HOTEL is both a grand modern hotel and an airline terminal, marking Denmark's entry into post-war modernity. It was a major work of the 1950s, under the banner of functionalism, simplicity and elegance. This total work of art, where everything from the ashtray to the volume of the building was conceived and designed by the same man, Arne Jacobsen, the great Scandinavian architect and designer.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus célèbres. Le musée Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacré une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’événement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enquêter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera également à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya: Visions of Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considéré comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclamé. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passé mouvementé de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doué et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son génie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-même et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musée d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a réuni tous les portraits de Cézanne. Cela a été l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cézanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: In this episode we will decipher the most famous works of Johannes Vermeer. He was born in 1632 and lived his whole life in Delft. He painted mainly interior scenes, everyday life with middle-class people but also with servants. He is the author of "The Milkmaid

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: How can desire be expressed in painting? Over the centuries, numerous artists have passionately sought to express or arouse such a sentiment. Take a look at paintings such as “Rolla” by Gerveix representing the total abandonment of the woman’s body. The story of “Danae”, painted by Corregio, provides a mythological excuse for depicting the female body naked. As for Fragonard, he succeeded in reproducing the acme of desire between man and woman as they struggle around the “Bolt”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Fanny Bouyagui, visual artist and director of the association Art Point M, and who is at the origin of the Braderie de l'Art in Roubaix. Since 1991, this event welcomes dozens of artists with a single motto, create from recycled objects. But before the arrival of the public, Fanny must make sure that certain rules are respected. We will accompany her throughout this very busy day.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: Throughout the first half of the 20th century, the Marmottan Museum was a center of First Empire art. We go there to admire the magnificent collection of Paul Marmottan, and to relive the nostalgia of the great Napoleonic era, its imperial splendor, its past glories. But little by little, the Marmottan Museum is becoming a showcase for another style of art, less classic, more avant-garde: impressionism. In 1993, the museum changed its name: it became the Musée Marmottan-Monet.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Léonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un événement remarquable s'est produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituée de peintures de Léonard de Vinci a été réunie dans une exposition unique : Léonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Léonard est reconnu comme étant peut-être le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne s'arrêtaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et s'étend sur Léonard le visionnaire, Léonard l'inventeur. Depuis l'endroit où il a vécu ses dernières années au Château du Clos Lucé en France, nous verrons que Léonard de Vinci était peut-être l'incarnation même de l'esprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux légendes de la comédie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnées des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et dépense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se régale d'une paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors d'un détour, Jan découvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient qu'un singe était un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bée lorsque Braxton enlève ses vêtements. Sacré moment !

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Lissa Rivera is a Brooklyn-based photographer whose work has received numerous awards and accolades and has been exhibited internationally. Lissa's latest project looks at photography's connection to identity on a personal level, focusing on her domestic partner as her muse. Rivera was chosen as a "Woman to Watch" for the biennial exhibition at the National Museum of Women in the Arts.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Emil Bührle collection at the Maillol Museum
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the Emil Bührle collection at the Maillol Museum in Paris.This collection is that of Emil Bührle, a student of art history who became passionate about collecting Monet's works after a visit to the National Gallery in Berlin. He started his collection with works by Claude Monet, but continued to fill it with works by Cézanne, Gauguin... Works that you can observe during this visit.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Japan-japanism, inspired objects, 1867-2018" at the decorative arts museum. Japan began to be known around the 1850s and its art was quickly recognized. In this exhibition you will be able to observe Japanese objects, but also objects of Japanese influence which testify to the relations between France and Japan.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Masterpieces Unveiled
programme.desc: Where do we start when we want to talk about such a famous painting as Velázquez “Las Meninas”? There is an incredibly huge bibliography on this painting, to the point that it is almost utopian to think or hope we can document ourselves on everything in and about it... From the late 1800s to the early 2000s, dozens of books have come out all over the world specifically and solely devoted to this one, single painting. A parallel literary current has even developed around the “enigmas” and “mysteries” connected with “Las Meninas”.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Jef Aerosol, one of the pioneers of street art. This stencil artist is the sponsor of Solid'Art, a contemporary art fair unlike any other, where the money raised helps children go on vacation. To celebrate the opening of the fair, he worked on a performance. We will follow him throughout this day of preparations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The National Gallery in London is one of the world’s greatest art galleries. It is brimming with masterpieces, an inexhaustible treasure trove of history and an endless source of stories. This film gives a voice to those whose lives have been touched by the Gallery, from the security guard to the director, including daily visitors, celebrities and members of the royal family. Claudia Winkleman, Michael Palin, Terry Gilliam, Jacqueline Wilson and Her Royal Highness Princess Eugenie reveal their deeply personal connection to the National Gallery.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui était Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie d'une véritable icône, découvrez son art et la vérité qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementée. La combinaison d'interviews, de commentaires et d'une exploration détaillée de l'art de Kahlo, offre un trésor de couleurs et un festin de vitalité. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilégié à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa créativité fébrile, sa résilience et sa soif inégalée pour la vie.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, réalisateur récompensé à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aimé au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-même. Moi, Claude Monet révèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donné naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommés du XIXe et du début du XXe siècle. Tourné à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inédite et intime de certains des décors cultes les plus appréciés de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paul Sérusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Sérusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Named Euphrosyne, Thalia and Aglaia, they embody mirth, abundance and splendour. They are the Three Graces, daughters of Jupiter and companions of Venus. A very prized subject as early as the Renaissance, it allowed for a triple representation of the female nude in all its ideal beauty. Observe their grace in the painting by Raphael and the delicacy of their veils in Botticelli’s “La Primavera” or in a magnificent work by Cranach recently acquired by the Louvre Museum. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, célèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse virée sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnés des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquités sillonnent le comté à la recherche de trésors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick découvre d’anciens graffitis médiévaux cachés dans la cathédrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un détour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: Gutenberg est considéré comme le père de l’imprimerie moderne. La petite histoire raconte qu’il se serait inspiré du pressoir à raisin utilisé par les vignerons pour inventer sa machine. De cette anecdote historique, deux artistes ont entrepris d’éditer un livre qui étanchera la soif de n’importe quel lecteur gourmand. Dans cet épisode, nous rencontrerons Luz et Anaïs, deux artistes opposées et absolument complémentaires.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Lucian Freud, l'un des peintres britanniques les plus célèbres de notre époque, est également l'un des rares artistes du XXe siècle à s'être représenté dans un autoportrait avec une telle constance. Ses autoportraits donnent un aperçu fascinant à la fois de sa personnalité et de son évolution en tant que peintre, depuis son premier portrait peint en 1939 jusqu'au dernier. Grâce à des entretiens fascinants avec d'anciens modèles, des amis et d'éminents experts, ce documentaire intensément captivant révèle l'œuvre d'un maître qui représente une étude captivante sur la dynamique du vieillissement et le processus d'autoreprésentation.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musée du Petit-Palais a été construit à Paris pour l’Exposition Universelle de 1900, en même temps que le Grand Palais. La collection comprend des chefs-d’œuvre comme le Portrait de l’artiste en costume oriental de Rembrandt, le Port de mer au soleil couchant du Lorrain ou les Trois baigneuses de Cézanne. C’est également là qu’on peut admirer le fameux et très sensuel Sommeil de Gustave Courbet. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: British Museum is a museum of human history and culture, located in London, United Kingdom. It contains over seven million of the world's most important objects.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Le Château de Maisons Laffitte surplombe la Seine par un jardin à la française en pente douce. Il est composé d'un corps central flanqué de 2 ailes. Une apparence symétrique que nous croyons connaître : l'Hôtel de ville de Paris où les mairies d'arrondissement de la capitale sont bâties sur le même modèle. Sa postérité en a banalisé l'image. Pourtant Maisons a été une révolution dans l'architecture du château français. Il est le chef d'oeuvre d'un architecte de génie, François Mansart. Un prototype qui permet une magnifique leçon d'architecture ….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le collectionneur danois : de Delacroix à Gauguin
programme.desc: Wilhelm Hansen fut un homme d’affaires visionnaire, qui vécut au Danemark au XIXème siècle. Il fut l’un des rares collectionneurs à s’intéresser aux peintres impressionnistes, à une époque où ils étaient attaqués et dénigrés. Le film nous amène dans la maison d’été de Hansen dans la banlieue de Copenhague et nous fait visiter l’extraordinaire exposition à la Royal Academy de Londres consacrée à sa collection.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: C’est l’un des artistes les plus controversés et pourtant, l’un des plus influents. La collection de Picasso contenait principalement des Renoir. Matisse le vénérait. Monet également. Renoir a été crucial dans la création du mouvement impressionniste, avant de le rejeter totalement pour se lancer dans un genre radicalement différent, avec beaucoup de succès. La Collection Barnes à Philadelphie possède plus de toiles de Renoir que n’importe quelle autre galerie au monde et c’est là que nous tenterons de lever le voile sur l’histoire remarquable de cet incroyable artiste.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus représentative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant bénéficié d’un accès exclusif à une grande variété d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quête de perfection de Degas à travers l’expérimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en étudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Rediscover the paintings of Jacob Jordaens. This artist is the subject of a special exhibition at the Petit Palais in 2013-1014.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: King Philip IV of Spain’s portrait painter, Diego Velazquez, (1599-1660) is the archetype of the brilliant court painter and alone embodies the stunning Spanish school of the “golden” 17th century. Admired for the psychological reality of his portraits, particularly that of “Pope Innocent X” belonging to the Doria Pamphilj Gallery, he is above all known for his masterpieces on display in the Museo del Prado, particularly “Las Meninas” where he represents himself beside the infant and her retinue. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs télévisés Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnés des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgré les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquités d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côté, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching découvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risqué le ridicule et la ruine pour protéger le bétail.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Masterpieces Unveiled
programme.desc: Where do we start when we want to talk about such a famous painting as Velázquez “Las Meninas”? There is an incredibly huge bibliography on this painting, to the point that it is almost utopian to think or hope we can document ourselves on everything in and about it... From the late 1800s to the early 2000s, dozens of books have come out all over the world specifically and solely devoted to this one, single painting. A parallel literary current has even developed around the “enigmas” and “mysteries” connected with “Las Meninas”.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Jef Aerosol, one of the pioneers of street art. This stencil artist is the sponsor of Solid'Art, a contemporary art fair unlike any other, where the money raised helps children go on vacation. To celebrate the opening of the fair, he worked on a performance. We will follow him throughout this day of preparations.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: L'icône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quête de trésors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarqués dans un Boat Trip d'antiquités, évoquant leurs souvenirs d'enfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul découvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le résultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dépendra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Jady Bates is an internationally known photographer, exhibited at Soho Photo Gallery in New York. She is known for her "darkroom photographer" series, which depicts naked women in black and white with words and/or phrases written on them. She is also the photographer of the band THE SLANTS.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Hey ! Modern art & pop culture" at the Halle Saint-Pierre in Paris. This is the fourth exhibition on these themes of modern art and pop culture. You will find a wide variety of works such as Paul Toupet or The Kid, artists who are not very well known but whose works are worth a look.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde at the Musée Maillol
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition "Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde" at the Musée Maillol. This exhibition shows how Giacometti evolved from style to style. It tells his story from the first busts he sculpted at the age of 13, to the realization of large-scale sculptures towards the end of his life.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art contest
programme.desc: With just one subject and 45 minutes on the clock, four artists go head-to-head in a public showdown of creativity. In the heart of Le Havre, they must create a unique artwork on the spot, turning a simple theme into a masterpiece. Will they rise to the challenge or crumble under pressure?

programme.title: Art contest
programme.desc: 1 subject and 45 minutes to create!4 artists confront each other in public and create an artwork based on a theme linked with a particular event.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: 200 years after it opened and a century after acquiring its first Van Gogh works, the National Gallery hosted the largest Van Gogh exhibition ever held in the UK (September 14, 2024 to January 19, 2025). The exhibition was a huge success, unanimously praised by the press, and tickets sold out quickly, making this film the only way to see what Forbes called a “once-in-a-lifetime exhibition.”Discover the passion that drove one of the world's most beloved artists to revolutionize art. Van Gogh: Poets & Lovers rewrites history and celebrates Van Gogh's genius without exploiting his suffering, allowing audiences to truly understand this iconic artist in a whole new way...

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cézanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and won't miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: How can desire be expressed in painting? Over the centuries, numerous artists have passionately sought to express or arouse such a sentiment. Take a look at paintings such as “Rolla” by Gerveix representing the total abandonment of the woman’s body. The story of “Danae”, painted by Corregio, provides a mythological excuse for depicting the female body naked. As for Fragonard, he succeeded in reproducing the acme of desire between man and woman as they struggle around the “Bolt”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates Stéphany Mora and Harleena will compete on an imposed theme. Today, the theme is vineyards. They will have one hour to take the best picture possible. Let’s see who will win.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balance and Bend: Balance and Connect
programme.desc: Stand tall and find your truest state of focus and center with this balancing flow. Use the breath to align your posture and learn to experience your practice, rather than thinking it through. Asanas, the physical yoga poses, then become a practice of feeling more than a mental exercise.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on a boxing session, perfect for strengthening the upper body. Guillaume and Sabrina start with a targeted warm-up, focusing on the neck, shoulders, and back. Then, they introduce boxing movements to build arm strength and improve coordination. Cardio exercises are included to raise the heart rate and boost endurance. All in a motivating atmosphere—ideal for an energy boost from the comfort of home!

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Strengthen and Surrender: Lower Body Balance for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: This moving meditation leads you through a series of postures that will strengthen the hips and hamstrings. Find balance between ease and effort while bringing a sense of curiosity to your experience of each posture.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: C'est reparti pour une nouvelle semaine de compétition. Mais avant de s'affronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, les quatre décorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous à Bruxelles dans l'atelier. L'occasion de jauger leur adversaire. Et le premier prétendant au titre d’as de la déco, le voici : Mickaël, 34 ans, scénographe et à la recherche d'un emploi. Mais pas le temps de rêver. La concurrence arrive avec Aurélie, 31 ans, professeur d'arts plastiques.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the team guides you through a targeted upper body session. With a thoughtful warm-up, precise moves, and tons of good vibes, this workout focuses on arms, shoulders, and core. The coaches bring humor, energy, and support for a safe and effective effort. Every exercise is clearly explained and adaptable so everyone can follow along at their own pace. A perfect routine to build strength while having fun!

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Recharge and Revitalize: Hip and Shoulder Opening
programme.desc: Allow your breath to be bigger than the movements of your body in this invigorating sequence. All other instructions are secondary, as this sequence calls on you to use your breath as the only mediator between mind and body. Use this steady rhythm to inform your every moment of your life and practice.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Core Connection: Strengthen Your Center to Cultivate Core and Balance
programme.desc: A bold sequence, Core Connection uses confident poses to help you embrace your inner strength and let go of any tensions you might encounter. Use this balancing sequence to cultivate peace of mind, even through awkward or challenging situations.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, we're off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... We'll then head to the cherry capital, Céret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Virginie, a 54-year-old woman from Nantes, is brimming with ideas, and she's determined to prove that she's the Deco Master! Her brain is constantly bubbling. In fact, her explosive temperament prompted Virginie to quit her previous job to concentrate on her passion. While her new career forces her to think in terms of organization rather than decoration, this doesn't stop Virginie from having a very assertive style, and Virginie has more than one string to her bow.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’été est la saison où les légumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potées ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des légumes de saisons, idéals pour se réchauffer. Pour débuter ce nouveau voyage, un légume qui trônait déjà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potée locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la découverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent légumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous présentera différentes techniques et méthodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour découvrir des races anciennes de volaille réintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’éleveur Fred Ménager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour découvrir comment est attribué le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Périgord pour préparer un civet de dindon. Installée dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour découvrir un étonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo cuisine des pois chiches. Comme ils sont originaires du Moyen-Orient, elle décide de préparer des recettes libanaises. Au menu : fallafels avec des pois chiches, du kumquat, des épices, de la cannelle, et blettes aux pois chiches, persil, menthe et boulgour.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo met la Normandie à l'honneur ! Avec le président de la région, Hervé Morin, elle prépare des pommes pochées dans un sirop de cannelle, ainsi que des moules... à sa façon.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Do wild animals still exist ? - Part 1
programme.desc: Animals represent 2/3 of the species on earth. We are increasingly concerned about our impact on the world. But what place does man have for the wild animal? Discover how it is possible to reintroduce wild animals in South Africa, or the disaster that took place with the sea lions in Namibia, and also how to preserve rhinos or other animals in biodiversity. There, women and men manage to protect wildlife every day.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associé à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immatériel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompés : avec près de 1 000 variétés - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillées, ou encore pressées, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

Asanas, the physical yoga poses, then become a practice of feeling more than a mental exercise.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la région aux côtés de la pétillante Marithé. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glacés maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce périple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcément l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus précisément dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau être le premier port de pêche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone réservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour découvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’élevage dans une ferme aquacole en Méditerranée, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et même le cabillaud dans l’immense marché de Rungis. Julie a challengé le Chef Olivier Bellin installé à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson méconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quel bonheur de retrouver ce fruit printanier ! Les fraises redonnent des couleurs à nos assiettes et nous apportent une bonne dose de vitamines et d’antioxydants. Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo nous dévoile deux recettes sucrées autour des fraises.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Pour les paresseux et tous ceux qui n’ont pas le temps, Luana Belmondo propose deux petites recettes simples et efficaces. Découvrez son pain à l'ail et au fromage, et ses spaghettis à l'ail.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela starts her day with a boat ride through the canals of the majestic Jumeirah Al Qasr Hotel. She then meets with chef Gabi for a healthy cooking class, as well as a fitness influencer with whom she will go on a fitness tour. She will end her day with a Thai massage in the hotel's beautiful, lush garden.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, our host Gabriela will spend her day at the beautiful Royal Meridien. She'll learn new recipes with Chef Jorge at Brasserie 2.0. She'll enjoy a very special facial at the hotel's spa, before taking wakeboarding lessons with Coach Mike at sunset.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela wakes up in a tent at Banan Beach in Dubai and gets inspired by Raha Moharrak the first Saudi women who climbed the Mount Everest and seven highest summits. Afterwards the two have kitesurf lessons and lots of fun. Gabriela ends her day with some dance flow yoga with her trainer Steph by sunset.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Pays d'Auge is the beating heart of Normandy. Honfleur with its picturesque port, the Basilica of Lisieux, a major pilgrimage site, and the Haras du Pin, the cradle of horse breeding, illustrate the diversity of this land of traditions, where craftsmanship and gastronomy reign supreme.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, our presenter Gabriela will visit Sustainable City in Dubai. She will discover how the residents garden, how they dress in sustainable clothes and, of course, how they eat by preparing healthy recipes. She will end her day with a Qigong class with a Qigong master.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, our presenter Gabriela takes us to the luxury hotel Park Hyatt. Accompanied by Sia Manzano, Gabriel plans to enjoy the day in this luxurious setting. The two women will receive a golf lesson, then they will enjoy the spa, as well as a cooking lesson with the chef of the hotel.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Bhakti Flow: Open Your Upper Back and Shoulders
programme.desc: Bhakti Flow invite à une expansion de tout votre être grâce à la pratique du bhakti, la dévotion. Cet enchaînement allie équilibre et force, tout en attirant l’attention sur les zones du corps où la tension se dissimule, souvent ignorées. Apprenez à donner de l’espace à votre respiration et laissez-vous porter par le déroulement de la séquence.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on a full-body workout using a chair as the main tool. Guillaume and Sabrina guide viewers through simple yet effective exercises like squats, leg raises, and glute-strengthening moves. They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Anahata Flow: Open Hips, Shoulders and Heart
programme.desc: A heart-centered practice, Anahata Flow allows the body to seek the freedom of the sky while unifying with the breath.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourd'hui, c'est la discrète Valérie qui va tenter de prouver que l'As de la déco, c'est elle. A 41 ans, cette Liégeoise est passionnée par le home staging ou l'art de mettre une propriété en valeur pour en stimuler la vente ou la location. Un précepte que Valérie applique d'ailleurs dans son intérieur.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If you're a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brévonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, we'll explore the Libournais region, where we'll uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, we'll arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but it's not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Bêtises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C'est à Giverny que démarre le voyage de Julie, celui dont le nom résonne immédiatement comme le berceau de l’Impressionnisme a gardé une authenticité émouvante, Giverny impose son style, murmure son histoire. Sa notoriété est fortement liée à la présence historique de Claude Monet et à tous les fabuleux témoins laissés par ce dernier. Claude Monet a aussi laissé son empreinte dans la cuisine à Giverny. Ses carnets de recettes sont là pour en témoigner. C’est dans ces carnets que Julie va s’inspirer pour remplir le sien, au menu : Lapin en compote, feuilleté d’andouilles au camembert, et charlottes aux abricots.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas être déçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Découvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits préférés des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au même titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Coté recettes, Julie fera découvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous réserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien être.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Avec son amie Myriam, Luana Belmondo prépare deux recettes à base de safran. Au programme : orecchiette (petites pâtes italiennes) avec de la saucisse, et lotte au citron confit avec sa purée d’asperges.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana accueille Héloïse Brion, créatrice de "Miss Maggie's Kitchen

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Do wild animals still exist ? - Part 2
programme.desc: Yann Arthus-Bertrand surprises us with preserved landscapes. And sometimes even with vast spaces where man's imprint remains invisible. Yann Arthus-Bertrand continues his world tour in favour of the protection of the environment and wildlife. From the tip of the African continent, he decides to take down the fences to let the animals roam freely, then he takes us to Cambodia to see if the tigers will disappear. Then we head to London to follow the chimpanzee or to France to study and save the bees.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of Home Training focuses on a full-body workout using a chair as the main tool. Guillaume and Sabrina guide viewers through simple yet effective exercises like squats, leg raises, and glute-strengthening moves. They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Bhakti Flow: Open Your Upper Back and Shoulders
programme.desc: Bhakti Flow invite à une expansion de tout votre être grâce à la pratique du bhakti, la dévotion. Apprenez à donner de l’espace à votre respiration et laissez-vous porter par le déroulement de la séquence.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadrée par les équipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtés de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la vénerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du métier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destinés à la vénerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frédéric Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotté au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, let's discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo met l'avocat à l'honneur, ce fruit originaire du Mexique qui présente de nombreux bienfaits pour notre santé. Elle nous propose une recette de gambas à la purée de concombres et avocats, ainsi qu'une panna cotta à l'avocat accompagnée de sa salade de fraises.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Les apéros improvisés, ce n’est pas toujours facile. Quand les amis débarquent sans prévenir, le stress peut vite monter. Pas de panique, Luana Belmondo et Thomas Clouet, grand spécialiste en la matière, improvisent un apéro au pied levé avec trois fois rien. Des macarons de champignons, un mini tartare de bœuf, et le tour est joué !

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, our host Gabriela will spend her day at the beautiful Royal Meridien. She'll learn new recipes with Chef Jorge at Brasserie 2.0. She'll enjoy a very special facial at the hotel's spa, before taking wakeboarding lessons with Coach Mike at sunset.

programme.title: Sharks of Lost Island
programme.desc: Et team med forskere under ledelse av marinøkolog Dr. Enrich Sala reiser ut for å utforske landområdene og havet rundt Pitcairn-øyene i Stillehavet. Disse mystiske øyene som først ble bosatt av mytterister gir oss en tidsreise tilbake i tid til et yrende maritimt økosystem, og hjemstedet til et av verdens største rovdyr, haien.

programme.title: Shark Island
programme.desc: Enric Sala og teamet skal dykke i det vernede farvannet til Cocos nasjonalpark utenfor vestkysten av Costa Rica.

programme.title: Pristine Seas: The Power of Protection
programme.desc: Vi følger National Geographics utforsker Enric Sala og hans Pristine Seas-prosjekt, der de reiser verden rundt for å redde havene.

programme.title: Super Reefs
programme.desc: I 2009 utforsket National Geographic Pristine Seas de sydlige Linjeøyene, og fant urørte korallrev, blomstrende økosystemer fulle av haier og fiskestimer. Men i 2015-16 drepte en uvanlig økning i havtemperaturen halvparten av korallene. Teamet til Pristine Seas reise tilbake i 2021, i håp om å se tegn på forbedring. Det de i stedet fant var den mest spektakulære gjenopprettingen av korallrev noensinne.

programme.title: Shark Island

programme.title: Utemmede Filippinene
programme.desc: Vi begynner på den lille øya Batan, der vi treffer en unik slange og en utbredt landkrabbe.

programme.title: Pristine Seas: The Power of Protection

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Veterinær i Yukon
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley deltar i et kappløp mot reinsdyr, fem moskusokser skal undersøkes og Daisy skal på familiegjenforening.

programme.title: Vinterens skjulte undre
programme.desc: Det krevende vinterværet presser dyrene til bristepunktet. Bare de tøffeste og mest oppfinnsomme dyrene overlever.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Den etterlengtede spinoffen til den legendariske The Incredible Dr. Pol-serien er endelig her! Med dr. Pol og hans sønn Charles i spissen, slår Pol-familiens tre generasjoner seg sammen for å øke sitt dyrekjære imperium og ta fatt på et ambisiøst nytt prosjekt: Å transformere 1416 mål med ubebygd land til en fullt funksjonell familiegård!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Familien Pol må plante ferdig høyfrø, og de setter opp bikuber!

programme.title: Australia's Land Of The Ancients
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en fascinerende reise gjennom det eldgamle landskapet i det nordøstlige Australia – den mest biologisk mangfoldige regionen på kontinentet. Fra massive saltvannskrokodiller som speider etter sitt neste måltid til pungdyrmødre som beskytter ungene sine, avslører vi hvordan dyr overlever under de tøffe forholdene i et landskap i stadig endring.

programme.title: Alaskas farligste
programme.desc: I Alaska finner vi noen av USAs farligste dyr. Når vinteren er over, finner kjøtteterne fram til elvene og slettene for å få mest mulig sol.

programme.title: Vinterens skjulte undre
programme.desc: Det krevende vinterværet presser dyrene til bristepunktet. Bare de tøffeste og mest oppfinnsomme dyrene overlever.
